title: Realistic sports coupe + realistic road-course scene with drivable controls and HUD

requirements.summary: Replace the in-race player car placeholder with a more realistic wide-body sports coupe (yellow with rear gradient accent and spoiler) using distinct paint/glass/rubber materials.
acceptanceCriteria: When launching the race scene (currently via Matchmaking -> Accept Match), the player's car is visually a realistic sports coupe (not the current simple box-based model).
The player car’s primary color reads as yellow, includes a visible rear rainbow/gradient accent, and has a clear rear spoiler element.
Car materials visually differ (e.g., glossy painted body, darker glass, rubber tires) under scene lighting.

file_operations.description: Create a reusable react-three-fiber car model component representing a modern wide-body sports coupe from a rear/chase-view silhouette, including a prominent rear spoiler, separate meshes/materials for glossy yellow paint, darker glass, and rubber tires; load and apply the livery texture asset for the rear gradient accent. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Replace/retire the current boxy in-scene player car rendering with the new RealisticSportsCoupeCar component for the local player (and keep/adjust a simpler model for other cars if desired), ensuring materials read as paint/glass/rubber under existing lighting. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

requirements.summary: Upgrade the race environment to a more realistic road-course scene with asphalt, grass verges, red/white curbs, guardrails/barriers, and tuned outdoor lighting/fog.
acceptanceCriteria: The track environment includes visible asphalt surface, grass off-track areas, and red/white curbing.
Trackside barriers/guardrails are present and visually consistent along the circuit.
Lighting and post effects (fog/sky) produce a more realistic outdoor track appearance than the current stylized arena-like ring.

file_operations.description: Create a road-course environment component that renders an asphalt racing surface with grass verges, red/white curbs, and repeated guardrail/barrier segments, and exposes tunable parameters for outdoor lighting and fog to achieve a realistic look; load required textures from generated assets and apply appropriate tiling/roughness/normal usage where applicable. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Replace the current ring/arena-like track visuals with RealisticRoadCourseScene, wiring it into the existing scene render path and ensuring fog/sky/lighting is configured for a realistic outdoor track appearance. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

requirements.summary: Ensure the player can drive the car with responsive keyboard controls and a stable third-person chase camera behind the car.
acceptanceCriteria: Keyboard controls allow driving the car (accelerate/brake + steering) and the car’s position/rotation updates accordingly.
The camera follows behind the car in a chase view that keeps the car centered similarly to the reference screenshot while driving.
Driving remains playable without jitter (no extreme camera shaking or instability during normal driving).

file_operations.description: Add a focused hook that centralizes keyboard input state (accelerate/brake/left/right) and produces smooth control signals suitable for updating vehicle movement each frame. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Add a hook for a stable third-person chase camera that follows behind the player car with configurable follow distance/height and smoothing, avoiding excessive shake/jitter while maintaining a rear-of-car perspective. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Wire the new control and camera hooks into the existing per-frame simulation so the player car is drivable (accel/brake/steer) and the camera remains stable and centered in a chase view behind the car; reduce/disable existing random camera shake during normal driving to meet stability requirements. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

requirements.summary: Add an in-race HUD overlay showing lap progress and current speed, positioned away from the center and readable over the 3D scene.
acceptanceCriteria: During the race, UI displays lap progress (e.g., "Lap 1/3") and a speed value that changes as the car accelerates/brakes.
HUD elements are readable on top of the 3D scene and are placed away from the screen center.

file_operations.description: Create a lightweight HUD overlay component (DOM overlay above the Canvas) that displays at minimum lap/total laps and a live speed readout, styled for readability and placed away from the screen center. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Integrate RaceHUDOverlay into the race view so it receives the current lap/total laps and speed derived from the player car state, and ensure the overlay renders above the 3D scene without blocking the center. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

requirements.summary: Add required generated static textures/decals under frontend/public/assets/generated and load them directly from the frontend for car/track rendering.
acceptanceCriteria: All newly introduced textures/decals are stored in frontend/public/assets/generated and loaded directly by the frontend (e.g., via THREE.TextureLoader).
The realistic car appearance (yellow + rear gradient accent) is achieved using these static assets and/or materials in the scene.

file_operations.description: Add the generated realistic sports coupe livery/texture asset (yellow body with rear rainbow/gradient band) at this exact path for direct loading by THREE.TextureLoader.
Add the generated asphalt road texture asset at this exact path for direct loading by THREE.TextureLoader.
Add the generated grass verge texture asset at this exact path for direct loading by THREE.TextureLoader.
Add the generated trackside barrier/guardrail texture asset at this exact path for direct loading by THREE.TextureLoader.
Add the generated red/white curb texture asset at this exact path for direct loading by THREE.TextureLoader.

Wire the livery texture at frontend/public/assets/generated/sports-coupe-livery.dim_2048x1024.png into the player car material/UV usage to achieve the yellow base + rear gradient accent look. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Wire the environment textures at frontend/public/assets/generated/asphalt-realistic.dim_2048x2048.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/grass-verge.dim_2048x2048.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/curb-red-white-realistic.dim_2048x256.png, and frontend/public/assets/generated/guardrail-texture.dim_2048x512.png into the track meshes/materials for asphalt/grass/curbs/guardrails. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
